title: Vanilla Enhanced
description: Overhauls Minecraft with new Biomes, Items, Mobs, Bosses, and Structures. Improved Visuals, QoL, Multiplayer Support, and Optimization for Smooth Performance. Perfect for a fresh Minecraft Adventure!
body:
![Vanilla Enhanced](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4c37ff9682c881f570ce4af333afeaa7955e4b83.png)
# The perfect Modpack to enhance Minecraft
### Overhauled World (Wilder Wild, Nature's Spirit, BetterEnd & Nether)
- 🏕️ 200+ new Biomes 
- 💎 3000+ new Items 
- ⛩️ 500+ new Structures 
- 🐪 150+ new Mobs
- 🦖 New Bosses 
- 🐲 New Ender Dragon Fight
### Many new quality-of-life features (Xaero's Map, Charm, Wraith Waystones)
- 🌊 Enhanced Sounds and Visuals 
- 🤝 New Multiplayers Features 
- 🔌 World hoster
- 📜 Many new mechanics
### And more!
- ⚡️ Smoothly Optimized
- ✨ Included Shaders and Resource-packs
- ⚙️ Customized configs
- 🎮 Controller support

---
### ❓ Got Questions?
Join our [discord server](https://discord.com/invite/H7WWUz9wvN) for support, suggestions, and feedback.

Make sure to allocate at least more than 4096 MB of RAM before playing.
